title: Macros 101: The Only Guide You Need

slides_data.prompt: Dark premium background with floating 3D macro nutrient icons (protein, carbs, fats) in violet and coral neon glow, holographic style, clean typography space, 4:5
slides_data.headline: MACROS 101

slides_data.prompt: Elegant split visual: left side shows protein-rich foods (chicken, eggs, fish) in dark moody lighting, right side shows muscle fiber illustration, violet accent lighting, 4:5
slides_data.headline: PROTEIN
slides_data.body:
Builds and repairs muscle.
4 cal per gram.
Goal: 1.6-2.2g per kg bodyweight.
Best sources: chicken, fish, eggs, Greek yogurt, legumes.

slides_data.prompt: Dynamic shot of complex carb foods (oats, sweet potato, rice, fruits) arranged on dark surface with energy wave graphics, warm coral lighting, 4:5
slides_data.headline: CARBS
slides_data.body:
Your body's main fuel source.
4 cal per gram.
Goal: 3-5g per kg on training days.
Best sources: oats, rice, potatoes, fruits, whole grains.

slides_data.prompt: Artistic arrangement of healthy fat foods (avocado, nuts, olive oil, salmon) on dark marble with golden light accents, premium food photography, 4:5
slides_data.headline: FATS
slides_data.body:
Hormones, brain health, absorption.
9 cal per gram.
Goal: 0.8-1.2g per kg bodyweight.
Best sources: avocado, nuts, olive oil, fatty fish.

slides_data.prompt: Infographic-style plate divided into macro sections with percentage labels, dark background with violet grid overlay, data visualization aesthetic, 4:5
slides_data.headline: THE PERFECT PLATE
slides_data.body:
Muscle gain: 30% protein, 45% carbs, 25% fats
Fat loss: 35% protein, 35% carbs, 30% fats
Maintenance: 25% protein, 45% carbs, 30% fats

slides_data.prompt: Person scanning a balanced meal with smartphone showing AI macro breakdown, dark premium app interface glowing violet, lifestyle shot, warm lighting, 4:5
slides_data.headline: SKIP THE MATH
slides_data.body: Cals2Gains scans your food and calculates macros instantly with AI. No databases. No guessing. Just snap a photo.

slides_data.prompt: Dark premium background with Cals2Gains app mockup showing macro tracking dashboard, violet and coral gradient glow, floating food icons, aspirational, 4:5
slides_data.headline: START TRACKING SMART
slides_data.body: Free for 7 days. No credit card.
